qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: In a system with virtual addresses and page size, use of one-level page tables for virtual to physical address translation is not practical because of A. the large amount of internal fragmentation B. the large amount of external fragmentation C. the large memory overhead in maintaining page tables D

qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: A processor uses page tables for virtual to physical address translation. Page tables for both levels are stored in the main memory. Virtual and physical addresses are both bits wide.
